title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following approaches to tackling poverty and inequality, then decide which two would have the greatest long-term impact.
options: Increasing the minimum wage and strengthening workers' rights
Expanding access to free education and vocational training
Improving affordable housing provision in cities
Strengthening the social welfare safety net
Investing in infrastructure and economic development in deprived areas

script.text: Now decide which two would have the greatest long-term impact.

Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to poverty, welfare and social support. Discuss the following approaches to tackling poverty and inequality, then decide which two would have the greatest long-term impact. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
